title: aporum tumoriferum
intro: Aporum tumoriferum, also known as the "Muli" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in various herbal remedies for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aporum tumoriferum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Aporum tumoriferum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be made into a paste or powder for topical application.
